# Support

## Scope
Skillbase support covers:
- installation/setup issues
- reproducibility and lockfile behavior
- release verification and signature/attestation flows
- security policy and scanner behavior

## Request channels
- Questions and operational support: GitHub Issues
- Security-sensitive reports: follow `SECURITY.md` private disclosure guidance

## Triage and response targets
- Initial maintainer acknowledgment: within 2 business days
- High-severity release integrity/security incidents: within 24 hours
- Non-critical bug triage: within 5 business days

## What to include in support requests
- exact command(s) run
- full error output (`--json` output where available)
- environment details (OS, Node version, pnpm version)
- minimal reproduction manifest/fixture when possible
